banner.title: Cookie preferences
banner.body: We use necessary cookies for the site to work. Optional categories will only be enabled if you give consent.

modal.title: Configure cookies
modal.body: You can accept or reject optional categories. Necessary cookies remain active to guarantee the site's basic functions.

categories.title: Necessary
categories.description: Technical cookies used to remember your consent choice and keep the site's basic functions available.

categories.title: Preferences
categories.description: Category prepared for non-essential experience settings. There are currently no confirmed tools in this category.

categories.title: Analytics
categories.description: Category prepared for measurement and statistics. No analytics tool will be enabled until a real integration is confirmed.

categories.title: Marketing
categories.description: Category prepared for advertising or third-party pixels. There are currently no confirmed marketing scripts.

savedMessage: Your cookie preferences have been saved.
